race_meta.race_name: Rosconn Group Fulke Walwyn Kim Muir Challenge Cup Amateur Jockeys' Handicap Chase (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed insurrection at position 3 (15.0% probability) vs top pick Monbeg Genius (25.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~10.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Monbeg Genius > Herakles Westwood, but actual result was Insurrection > Monbeg Genius. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Insurrection had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 0.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
